name: vscode-python-inheritance
description: Visualize Python class inheritance and method overrides with Gutter icons and CodeLens, just like in PyCharm.

pythonInheritance.analyzeExternalLibrari.description: Whether to analyze external libraries (standard and third party) for inheritance. Enabling this provides better visibility into base classes from packages like 'json' or 'abc'.

pythonInheritance.visualizeClassVariable.description: Visualize overrides and implementations for class variables/fields.

pythonInheritance.visualizeMethods.description: Visualize overrides and implementations for methods.

enumDescriptions: Update index when a file is saved.
Update index automatically while typing (with a small delay).
Only update manually using the 'Reindex Project' command or when opening the file.
pythonInheritance.indexingStrategy.description: When to automatically update the inheritance index for the current file.

pythonInheritance.indexOnStartup.description: Perform a background scan of all Python files in the workspace on extension startup.

pythonInheritance.indexingConcurrency.description: Parallel Indexing Threads: Maximum number of files analyzed concurrently. Increase to speed up indexing on multi-core systems.
